The '''mishalope''' was species of striped, furry [[Mammal/Legends|mammal]] indigenous to [[Firrerre/Legends|Firrerre]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> They were commonly found near the [[Grand Falls]]. They clung to trees with small claws that can rip through the bark of their favorite trees, the [[Jopto tree]]. The bark was thin and chewy and when ripped off, revealed a sticky [[Color/Legends|green]] sap that was often used in Firrerre custard. They were [[marsupial]]s, and carried their young in a pouch.
